# Code Anchors: Theme Tokens

- `apps/prime/src/styles.css` — the semantic token definitions and the two mode value sets under the root selector, including the cross-mode colours that flip outside the top-level block.
- `apps/prime/src/app/layout/theme.tsx` — the runtime theme mode: local-storage persistence, operating-system default, and the toggle.
- `apps/prime/tailwind.config.js` — maps the utility colour theme onto the semantic tokens.
